response.body:
<html>
<head>
	<meta charset="utf-8">	
	<style type="text/css">
	<!-- 
		@import url(/css/content.css);
	-->
	</style>

	<script src="/js/cookieCode.dhtml" type="text/javascript" language="Javascript"></script>
	<script src="/js/treeCode.dhtml" type="text/javascript" language="Javascript"></script>

<title>
Xerox Phaser 4622
-
Status
</title>

<script language="JavaScript" type="text/javascript">
<!-- 

// frame defines
var HEADER_FRAME					= 0;
var TREE_FRAME						= 1;
var BRANDING_FRAME				= 2;
var CONTENT_FRAME					= 3;

// defines for top frame
var MAIN_TAB						= "Status";

// cookie defines
var DEFAULT_HIERARCHY				= "";
var DEFAULT_SELECTION				= 1;
var HIERARCHY_COOKIE_NAME		= "statusHierarchy";
var SELECTED_COOKIE_NAME			= "statusSelected";

// setting up the tree
var gTheTree						= new TreeConstructor( "Status",
															SELECTED_COOKIE_NAME,
															HIERARCHY_COOKIE_NAME,
															DEFAULT_SELECTION,
															DEFAULT_HIERARCHY );

// add the nodes to the tree
	//AddNode( gTheTree, HEAD_NODE, " Phaser 4622");
	AddNode( gTheTree, ROOT_NODE, "General", "/status/general.dhtml");
	AddNode( gTheTree, ROOT_NODE, "Alerts", "/status/statusAlerts.dhtml");
	AddNode( gTheTree, ROOT_NODE, "Trays", "/status/trays.dhtml" );
	AddNode( gTheTree, ROOT_NODE, "Consumables", "/status/consumables.dhtml" );
	AddNode( gTheTree, ROOT_NODE, "SMart eSolutions ", "/status/smartesolutions.dhtml" );

function LinkHitAndGotoPage( inMainTabPage, inUrlToHighlight )
{
	// set the URL to highlight, even if we set blank (i.e. no page to highlight)
	SetCookie( INDEX_PAGE_LINK_COOKIE, inUrlToHighlight );

	// go to the main tab page that was passed in
	document.location					= inMainTabPage;

	return;
}

// set the tree in a previously set state (i.e. based on cookies)
RestoreHierarchyStructure( gTheTree );
RestoreSelectedNode( gTheTree );

// -->
</script>
</head>

<frameset rows="105, *" border="0" frameborder="0" framespacing="0">
	<frame src="/tabsFrame.dhtml" scrolling="no" noresize name="Header Frame: Contains main navigation tabs and help button.">
	<frameset cols="260, *" border="0" frameborder="0" framespacing="0">
		<frameset rows="*, 130" border="0" frameborder="0" framespacing="0">
			<frame src="/displayTree.dhtml" scrolling="auto" noresize name="Content Frame: Contains navigation tree.">
			<frame src="/branding.dhtml" scrolling="no" noresize name="Footer Frame: Contains branding.">
		</frameset>
		<frame src="" scrolling="auto" noresize name="Body Frame: Contains feature information and settings.">
	</frameset>
</frameset>
</html>
